conservative.name: Imperator Rex
conservative.requirements:
Must be the Emperor.
Targets within extreme range.

success.description:
Every character loyal to the Empire within range gains the following condition or ability for 2 rounds (conditions and abilities are cumulative):
Extreme Range: Inspired condition
Long Range: Energised condition
Medium Range: Invigorated condition
Close Range: +1 defence value
Engaged: +1 soak value

sigmarsComet.description: The conditions and abilities granted by Imperator Rex last 3 rounds instead
